message:
fix: wrap all-tasks-complete steering in SYSTEM-REMINDER tags

The "all done" steering message was bare text while all other task
steering used <SYSTEM-REMINDER> XML tags. Models trained to attend
to that pattern ignored the bare message, leading to task_list(view)
loops after completing all tasks.

Extract taskReminderAllDone() to task_reminders.go for consistency
with other steering formatters. Updated message to be more directive:
"deliver your final output with the communicate tool."

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
